title: Disk & Storage (Windows)
description: Perintah untuk mengelola disk, partisi, dan storage di Windows.

commands.name: diskpart
commands.title: diskpart — Manajemen Disk
commands.description: Tool interaktif untuk mengelola disk, partisi, dan volume di Windows.
commands.examples:
# Masuk diskpart
diskpart

# List disk
DISKPART> list disk

# Pilih disk
DISKPART> select disk 1

# Buat partisi
DISKPART> create partition primary

# Format
DISKPART> format fs=ntfs label="Data" quick

# Assign huruf drive
DISKPART> assign letter=D

# Shrink volume 10GB
DISKPART> shrink desired=10240
commands.warning: diskpart bisa menghapus data secara permanen. Pastikan memilih disk/volume yang benar sebelum melakukan operasi destruktif!

commands.name: chkdsk
commands.title: chkdsk — Cek & Perbaiki Disk
commands.description: Memeriksa dan memperbaiki error pada filesystem disk.

options.description: Cari bad sectors dan recover data

commands.examples:
# Cek disk C
chkdsk C:

# Perbaiki error
chkdsk C: /f

# Cek dan perbaiki bad sectors
chkdsk D: /r

# Scan online
chkdsk C: /scan

# PowerShell
Repair-Volume -DriveLetter C -Scan

commands.name: wmic-disk
commands.title: wmic / Get-Volume — Info Disk
commands.description: Menampilkan informasi disk, partisi, dan penggunaan storage.
commands.examples:
# Info disk fisik (CMD)
wmic diskdrive list brief

# Info drive letters
wmic logicaldisk get name,size,freespace,filesystem

# PowerShell: Volume info
Get-Volume

# PowerShell: Disk info
Get-Disk | Format-Table

# PowerShell: Partisi
Get-Partition | Format-Table

# PowerShell: Space usage
Get-Volume | Select-Object DriveLetter, FileSystemLabel, @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round($_.Size/1GB,2)}}, @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round($_.SizeRemaining/1GB,2)}}

commands.name: fsutil
commands.title: fsutil — Utilitas Filesystem
commands.description: Tool lanjutan untuk mengelola filesystem NTFS dan FAT.
commands.examples:
# Info ruang disk
fsutil volume diskfree C:

# Buat file 1GB (untuk testing)
fsutil file createnew testfile.dat 1073741824

# Buat hard link
fsutil hardlink create link.txt original.txt

# Cek status short name (8.3)
fsutil behavior query disable8dot3
